exploration_notes: The event handler chain flows through 6 core files in client-go/tools/cache: (1) listwatch.go defines ListerWatcher interface and ListWatch struct that perform List+Watch against the API server; (2) reflector.go's Reflector uses a ListerWatcher to watch the API server and pushes events into a Store (the DeltaFIFO); (3) delta_fifo.go implements DeltaFIFO, a producer-consumer queue that accumulates Deltas (Added/Updated/Deleted/Replaced/Sync) per object key; (4) controller.go's processDeltas() pop
